name: @waa/desktop
description: Web Access Advisor desktop shell (Electron) — forks the API, serves the SPA same-origin, and drives system browsers
author: Web Access Advisor

scripts.pack:dir: npm run build && node scripts/stage-server.mjs && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build && node scripts/stage-server.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.dist:publish: npm run build && node scripts/stage-server.mjs && electron-builder --publish always
